subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One maketh mention of him who hath turned unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Thy name hath been present before the Divine Court, and thy mention hath descended from the Revealer of Verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر المظلوم من اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم قد حضر اسمک فی البساط ذکرک منزل الآیات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for detachment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
